title: angelica arguta
intro: Angelica arguta, also known as Wild Angelica or Japanese Angelica, is a perennial plant native to East Asia and parts of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Angelica arguta include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Angelica arguta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
